title: Pan-Seared Pork Chops with Crispy Temptation
description: Juicy pork chops topped with a crispy and savory temption crust, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear pork chops for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer skillet to the oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
While pork chops are cooking, mix bread crumbs and crushed temptation in a small bowl.
Remove pork chops from oven and top each chop with the bread crumb mixture.
Return skillet to the stovetop and cook over medium heat until the topping is crispy and golden brown.
